payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Rectangular interior window occupying most of the crop, fitted with closed white horizontal vinyl/blind slats and framed by dark side curtains; top valance and a small portion of a wooden sill are visible, no exterior view seen, approximate distance from camera ~2.0 m.

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"white window with horizontal blinds","long_description":"Rectangular interior window occupying most of the crop, fitted with closed white horizontal vinyl/blind slats and framed by dark side curtains; top valance and a small portion of a wooden sill are visible, no exterior view seen, approximate distance from camera ~2.0 m.","attributes":["white horizontal blinds","closed slats","narrow slat profile","dark side curtains","rectangular frame","top valance visible","partial wooden sill visible","interior window","no exterior view"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.0}
